title: coelorachis hirsuta
intro: Coelorachis hirsuta, also known as the hairy spike grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Coelorachis hirsuta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Coelorachis hirsuta is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be consumed as a powder or capsule.
